wikitext.*:
===[[Pokémon Stadium 2]]===
Lt. Surge returns in {{g|Stadium 2}} as part of the Kanto Gym Leader Castle.

During the game's [[Game credits|end credits]], Lt. Surge is seen having a battle with [[Morty]] at the [[Ecruteak Gym]].
